attacking_style: Does not typically initiate attacks; rides defensively to limit losses on steep uphill finishes. Focuses on maintaining contact with accelerations rather than launching own moves.
team_tactics: Movistar appears to position him for final climbs but lacks the domestique support to control tempo or launch sustained attacks. Relies on individual positioning rather than team-led setups.
terrain_preference: Can handle steep climbs at steady tempo but struggles with explosive gradients and sudden accelerations. Super-steep finishes consistently expose limitations rather than showcase strengths.
vulnerability: Completely unable to respond to explosive accelerations on super-steep finishes, particularly against Roglic. Lacks the punch needed when gradient spikes or pace suddenly intensifies.
key_patterns: Consistently reactive rather than proactive on climbs, never initiating decisive moves (3 observations).
Roglic accelerations repeatedly cause significant time losses, especially on steep finishes (3 observations).
Establishes as secondary GC contender but unable to close gap to winner (2 observations).
Time losses escalate dramatically when explosive power required: 7s to 2:43 margin (2 observations).
form_trajectory: negative: Progressive deterioration evident across observations, from losing 7s while staying competitive to completely detaching and losing 2:43 on similar terrain
